title: Create: Mechanical Teleporter
body:
# Create: Mechanical teleporter
> Teleporters network

## Disclaimer ***EARLY DEVELOPMENT***
> Not ready for production.
> Remember to back up your world.

## Requires Mechanicals Lib
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/mechanicals-lib")

## Features
- Kinetic teleporter block.
  - Works on trains, teleports between seats. ***(ALPHA) Still in development.***
  - Creative teleporter variant, no RPM required.
  - Common network
    - Sign based destination address available.
- Hand teleporter.
  - Editable address
  - Dyeable
  - Placeable
  - Configurable resource usage: air, durability, experience or none.
- Teleporter Manager block
  - Allow to choose between teleporters
  - Lock/Unlocks teleporter network for other players.

- Teleporting wand
  - Uses air
- Ender fluid, teleports entities.
- Ender soup, teleports to spawn.
- Ender casing.
- Ender quartz lamp.
- Ender Potato projectile.

**Thanks to the Creators of Create.**

Code inspiration from the [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create "Create") mod itself and [EnderIO](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enderio "EnderIO")
